Petition To Invalidate Trust Restatement, Remove Trustee, Appoint Temporary Trustee; And Complaint For Elder Financial Abuse And Tenant Harassment
Off Calendar Apr-19-2021 Continued To Jun-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alex Lemberg, Esq., counsel for Nujuawanda Daniels and Regionald Daniels, Petitioners (appearing by video conference).

The Court notes at the outset that Roger Meredith, counsel for the Trustee, Yulanda Williams, has reported in his opposition that the petition has not been duly or properly noticed, which Mr. Lemberg acknowledges. Additionally, the Court questions whether venue is proper in that the Trustee resides in Contra Costa County. Mr. Lemberg responds, noting that the trust corpus (real property) is located in San Francisco County and there is currently pending in San Francisco Superior Court litigation concerning the occupancy of that real property. Mr. Lemberg additionally cites various statutory authority and Rules of Court that would authorize the finding of venue in San Francisco County.

After further discussion, the Court will continue the matter to June 7, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to allow Mr. Lemberg to properly notice the hearing and to submit further pleading on venue.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

Petition To Invalidate Trust Restatement, Remove Trustee, Appoint Temporary Trustee; And Complaint For Elder Financial Abuse And Tenant Harassment
